# Agent options

<!-- source: 03-set-up.qmd (software comparison table, Roo Code/Cline/Positron rows) +
     08-advanced-llm-agents.qmd section "Software options"; needs a new paragraph on
     Claude Code specifically (only name-dropped once in v1) -->

A tour of the current agent landscape: Claude Code, VSCode + Copilot agent mode, GitHub Copilot CLI, and Positron Assistant.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge comparing two agent options on the same small task.
:::
